command:
echo '=== Stop all MT5/Wine ===' && systemctl stop mt5.service 2>/dev/null && systemctl stop xvfb.service 2>/dev/null && killall -9 terminal64.exe 2>/dev/null; wineserver -k 2>/dev/null; killall -9 Xvfb x11vnc 2>/dev/null; sleep 3 && echo '=== Clean X locks ===' && rm -f /tmp/.X99-lock /tmp/.X11-unix/X99 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Fix xvfb.service ===' && cat > /etc/systemd/system/xvfb.service << 'XEOF'
[Unit]
Description=X Virtual Frame Buffer for MT5
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
ExecStart=/usr/bin/Xvfb :99 -screen 0 1280x1024x24 -ac +extension GLX +render -noreset
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
XEOF
echo '=== Fix mt5.service ===' && cat > /etc/systemd/system/mt5.service << 'MEOF'
[Unit]
Description=MetaTrader 5 Trading Terminal
After=network.target xvfb.service
Requires=xvfb.service

[Service]
Type=simple
User=root
Environment=DISPLAY=:99
Environment=WINEPREFIX=/root/.wine
Environment=WINEDEBUG=-all
Environment=STAGING_WRITECOPY=1
ExecStartPre=/bin/sleep 3
ExecStart=/opt/wine-staging/bin/wine "/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/terminal64.exe"
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=30
StartLimitIntervalSec=600
StartLimitBurst=10

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
MEOF
echo '=== Create vnc.service ===' && cat > /etc/systemd/system/x11vnc.service << 'VEOF'
[Unit]
Description=VNC Server for MT5
After=xvfb.service
Requires=xvfb.service

[Service]
Type=simple
User=root
Environment=DISPLAY=:99
ExecStartPre=/bin/sleep 2
ExecStart=/usr/bin/x11vnc -display :99 -forever -shared -rfbport 5900 -nopw -xkb
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
VEOF
echo '=== Reload and start ===' && systemctl daemon-reload && systemctl enable xvfb.service mt5.service x11vnc.service 2>/dev/null && systemctl start xvfb.service && sleep 2 && systemctl start x11vnc.service && sleep 2 && systemctl start mt5.service && sleep 15 && echo '=== Service status ===' && systemctl is-active xvfb.service mt5.service x11vnc.service && echo '=== MT5 running ===' && ps aux | grep terminal64 | grep -v grep && echo '=== Terminal log ===' && TLOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$TLOG" ]; then tail -10 "$TLOG" | tr -d '\0'; fi
